title: M5 Public Note — Tier 2 Invariant Binding
description: Layer 1 declaration-shape schema binding M5 public-note publication compositions to ProCybernetica Tier 2 declared modes. Opaque hashes only. This schema does not perform runtime receipt lookup, source hash resolution, artifact existence checks, monitor attestation, timestamp authenticity verification, runtime publication gating, peer-review substitution, semantic invariant verification, public claim promotion, proof review, or full ProCybernetica composition-certificate instantiation.

binding_doctrine_version.description: Local binding doctrine version. This pins the declaration shape used by this repo; it is not a runtime verification, peer-review, publication approval, or proof-review claim.

opaque_hash.description: Opaque content-addressed reference. This schema validates hash shape only and does not resolve the hash, fetch the certificate, or verify artifact existence.

Opaque content-addressed reference for the public-note artifact. This schema validates hash shape only and does not resolve the hash, fetch the public note, verify publication, or substitute for peer review.

bound_modes.description: Declared adoption of ProCybernetica Tier 2 mode names. This object does not execute the corresponding analyses.
